description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the garland/aws-cli-docker Docker image and sets the variables AWS_DEFAULT_REGION=us-east-2 and GIT_STRATEGY=clone. Define a single stage named deploy. Add a job called s3-branch-deployment in the deploy stage that retries up to two times and executes the exact shell command `aws s3 sync . s3://wedding.flatiron-dc.com/$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME/ --delete --grants read=uri=http://acs.amazonaws.com/groups/global/AllUsers --exclude "*.git/*"` to synchronize the repository contents to an S3 bucket path based on the current branch. The job has no caches, artifacts, or conditional rules and runs on every pipeline.
